# Chapter 14: Energy systems integration  (~110 pp)
- 14.1 The grid: generation, transmission, distribution (15) · 14.2 Power generation: thermal, hydro, wind, solar, nuclear, geothermal (20) · 14.3 Energy storage: batteries, pumped hydro, thermal, hydrogen (15) · 14.4 Demand-side management and grid control (15) · 14.5 Off-grid and microgrid systems (12) · 14.6 The energy transition (12) · 14.7 Failure section: grid blackouts, runaway batteries, generation outages (21)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, scaling, control. **Project**: model a household with rooftop solar and batteries; estimate grid dependence. **Exercises**: 35.
